## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- Domain(s) touched: `stock` / `recipes` / `suggestions` / `queries` / `ui`
- Breaking changes: `yes/no`
- API contract changes: `yes/no`

## Validation

- [ ] `cd backend && bun test`
- [ ] `cd frontend && bun run build`
- [ ] Manual verification completed for affected flows

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Add before/after screenshots when relevant.

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated `README.md` if setup/behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (if release-relevant)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused and minimal
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files added
- [ ] New behavior is deterministic and explainable
